resources.string: PaisaTracker reads UPI payment notifications from apps like GPay, PhonePe, and Paytm, and bank SMS messages, to automatically detect expenses. No notification content is shared with any server. All processing happens entirely on your device. You can disable this at any time in Settings → Auto-capture.
View today\'s and monthly expenses with budget progress
Display your recent transactions with details
Track your monthly budget usage with visual progress indicator
